a.xlink:title: Mix multiple data streams with equal weighting.
Connects a node directly to a specific audio buffer.
Connects a node to a specific audio token and channel.
Connects a node to a specific buffer.
Connects a node to a specific output channel.
Sets the interpolation coefficient between existing and incoming data.
Supplies an external audio buffer to a specific token and channel.
Supplies a buffer to a single channel with mixing.
Supplies a buffer to multiple channels with mixing.
Apply node output to an existing buffer with mixing.
Routes a buffer's processing from one channel to another with fade.
Finalize configuration and start processing for a bounded duration.
Load a slice into a voice slot and activate it immediately.
Load a slice into a voice slot and activate it with looping enabled.
Captures node computation output into a buffer.
